vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1297 (feat(taskfile): wire vbrief CRUD into task surface); part of the #742 decomposition.

plan.title: Wire vBRIEF CRUD into task surface

narratives.Description: Blocked placeholder. Operator-facing wrappers for the CRUD tool. Scope finalizes when Child 2.1 lands.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Defer detailed plan until 2.1 lands. Expected: task vbrief:create / read / update / delete entries in the Taskfile, with arg passthrough to scripts/vbrief_crud.py.
narratives.UserStory: As an operator, I want task verbs for CRUD operations so I don't memorize the Python entry-point signature.

items.title: Add Taskfile entries with arg passthrough

narrative.Acceptance: task vbrief:* verbs work; tests cover passthrough.

references.title: Issue #1297: feat(taskfile): wire vbrief CRUD into task surface
